wizard.title: Build your first exit lane
wizard.subtitle: Configure your system, VPN provider and WireGuard ingress without editing separate configuration files.

step1.title: System check
step1.description: Exitlane checks the Linux environment, network access, WireGuard and the required system components.
step1.empty: Run the system check to continue.

step2.title: Local administrator
step2.description: Create the first local administrator account. Authentication will be enforced across all pages in a future alpha release.

step3.title: VPN provider
step3.description: NordVPN is the first provider implementation. Exitlane keeps the underlying architecture provider-independent.

provider.not_checked: Linux client has not been checked yet.
provider.sign_in_description: Choose a sign-in method. For a permanent gateway, an access token is the simplest option.
provider.token_step1: Open Nord Account and sign in.
provider.token_step2: In the menu on the left, click NordVPN.
provider.token_step3: Scroll down to Get access token.
provider.token_step4: Generate a new token and copy it immediately.
provider.token_step5: Paste the token into Exitlane below.
provider.advice_text: Choose a non-expiring token for a permanent gateway and secure your Nord Account with multi-factor authentication.
provider.token_privacy: Exitlane only uses the token for the local NordVPN login and does not store it.
provider.browser_step2: Open the displayed NordVPN link in your browser.
provider.browser_step4: Do not click Continue normally; copy the underlying link and paste it below.
provider.callback_hint: Paste the link behind the Continue button here.

step4.title: WireGuard ingress
step4.description: Generate a generic WireGuard client configuration for your router. UniFi, MikroTik, OPNsense and other routers can use this tunnel.

wireguard.endpoint_help: The local IP address is detected automatically.
wireguard.dns_help: Included in the configuration for your router.
wireguard.import_hint: Import this configuration into your router.

step5.title: Exitlane is almost ready
step5.description: Download the WireGuard configuration and import it into your router. Exitlane automatically checks whether the tunnel connects.
step5.waiting_for_connection: Waiting for the first WireGuard connection...

finish.copy_failed: Copying failed. View and copy the configuration manually.
finish.interface_inactive: The WireGuard interface is not active yet.
finish.no_handshake: No WireGuard handshake has been received yet.
